docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,565.00 FILED BY YEH, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEH, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER $810.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $870.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2025 - FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. THE COURT ALLOCATES 40% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO THE NAMED DEFENDANT ANDAM. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO CHRISTOPHER ANDAM.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER
